name: Banana Cinnamon French Toast
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the first 4 ingredients in a processor until smooth.
2. Place the bread in the milk mixture and soak until all liquid is absorbed, turning occasionally, about 20 minutes.
3. Melt butter in a large, heavy skillet over medium heat.
4. Add the bread and cook until golden brown, about 3 minutes per side.
5. Serve; pass warmed syrup separately.
